string.text: Researchers
Quest description
First quest title
Researchers: Find Professor Kovalev in the Great Swamps
I managed to find out that Professor Kovalev is in the swamps looking for assistants to conduct research. He can be found near the old church in the southern part of the swamps.
Researchers: Find Docent Markov
Docent Markov needs my help. He is located near the ecologists' bunker in Yantar.
Researchers: Find Candidate Pirogov
Candidate of Sciences Pirogov needs my help finding artifacts. He is currently in the Dark Valley. I hope he's still alive.
Researchers: Find Staff Member Chernov
Find Senior Researcher Chernov, who is located in one of the abandoned houses near the Army Warehouses.
Researchers: Find Professor Zhuk
Professor Vladislav Zhuk needs my help. I can find him somewhere near the Yanov railway station, in Jupiter.
Researchers: Find Docent Vorobushkin
Docent Vorobushkin is somewhere in Zaton. I need to find him to continue helping the research group.
Researchers: Find Academician Skabinsky

Docent Vorobushkin informed me that the head of the research group, Professor Skabinsky, has already moved on and is currently somewhere in the northern part of the Exclusion Zone. I have no idea how he managed to get there, but I need to find him quickly.
Researchers: Find Academician Skabinsky

Vorobushkin's calculations aren't entirely accurate, but it's worth a shot. Skabinsky thinks their results led to the "Ash Heap" anomaly. I need to find Skabinsky, who has gone ahead and is waiting for me there.
Researchers: Bring Kovalev three anomalous samples
A research group is searching for anomalous formations in the swamps. Assistant Kovalev asked me to find three samples.
Find the artifact in the "Lower Ash Heap" anomaly
One of the samples is located in the "Lower Ash Heap" anomaly.
Find the artifact in the "Swamp Hollow" anomaly
One of the samples is located in the "Swamp Hollow" anomaly.
Find the artifact in the "Western Swamp" anomaly
One of the samples is located in the "Western Swamp" anomaly.
Find the artifact in the "Sparker" anomaly
One of the samples is located in the "Sparker" anomaly.
Researchers: Bring Kovalev a laptop and three artifacts

Assistant Kovalev was taking measurements in Agroprom when an unexpected bandit attack caught him off guard. He dropped his laptop, which contains the data needed to find the artifacts, at the stalker base. I need to return his laptop to him, as well as find three artifacts.
Find Kovalev's laptop

Find Kovalev's abandoned laptop. Apparently, it is located in an EMP zone on the second floor of a building, and getting it will require passing through electrical anomalies and a small area of psy-influence.
Find the artifact. Location unknown.
I need to find an artifact in Agroprom. The exact location can be found by recovering Kovalev's laptop.
Find the artifact in the "Old Claws" anomaly
The artifact is located in the "Old Claws" anomaly.
Find the artifact in the "Anomalous Hollow"
The artifact is located in the "Anomalous Hollow".
Find the artifact in the "Bird Carousel" anomaly
The artifact is located in the "Bird Carousel" anomaly.
Researchers: Bring Markov three samples from Yantar
Docent Markov works separately from the group of scientists in Yantar. He asked me to find anomalous samples that I can track down using my detector.
Find the artifact in the "Grabbing Hands" anomaly
One of the samples is located in the "Grabbing Hands" anomaly.
Find the artifact in the "Poisoned Lake" anomaly
One of the samples is located in the "Poisoned Lake" anomaly.
Find the artifact in the "Concrete Dump" anomaly
One of the samples is located in the "Concrete Dump" anomaly. You will need psy-protection to reach it.
Researchers: Bring Markov three artifacts from the Wild Territory
Professor Markov reported that we need to expand the search area. The Wild Territory is located near Yantar. There are anomalous formations there too, at three different points of interest.
Find the artifact in the "Radioactive Workshop"
This anomaly is not marked on the map. The workshop itself can be found near the checkpoint to Rostok, and the area is highly radioactive.
Find the artifact in the "Electra" anomaly
The target is located somewhere around the Electra anomaly. You should grab more bolts or empty casings.
Find the artifact in the "Sparkling Dusk" anomaly
An anomaly in the tunnel under Rostok, also known as "Sparkling Dusk". It seems there should be a safe passage...
Researchers: Bring Markov three artifacts from the area near X-16

I need to find three artifacts near the old X-16 laboratory complex. Because of the "Brain Scorcher", this will be impossible without proper psy-protection. Professor Sakharov should be able to help me with this problem.
Find the artifact in the "St. Elmo's Fire" anomaly
The object is located in the "St. Elmo's Fire" anomaly. It's electrical, you'll need bolts.
Find the artifact in the "Wandering Lights" anomaly
The object is located in the "Wandering Lights" anomaly.
Find the artifact somewhere on the factory grounds
None of the researchers have gone this far. But a perfectly clear anomalous signal is coming from somewhere among the buildings on the Yantar factory grounds. I need to be careful.
Researchers: Bring Candidate Pirogov three samples from the Dark Valley
The Dark Valley is dangerous for a quiet artifact hunt. Mutants and bandits could be lurking around any corner. Nevertheless, I need to bring three anomalous samples from there for Professor Pirogov.
Find the artifact in the "Comet" anomaly
A fascinating anomaly that few have explored. It's located at the end of a long corridor where the "Comet" travels. The entrance is near the bandit base in the north.
Find the artifact in the "Dark Rift" anomaly
The anomalous sample is located somewhere in the "Dark Rift" anomaly.
Find the artifact in the "Deadly Cloud" anomaly
The "Deadly Cloud" anomaly is located on the territory of the bandit base, so if you don't fight your way in, you'll have to sneak in.
Researchers: Bring Candidate Pirogov three samples from the Truck Cemetery
Moving further, deep into the Zone. Our interest is now drawn to the Truck Cemetery. It doesn't differ much from the Dark Valley in the abundance of sudden mutants and bandits.
Find the artifact in the "Ravine" anomaly
Find the artifact in the "Ravine" anomaly.
Find the artifact in the "Roadside Picnic" anomaly
Find the artifact in the "Roadside Picnic" anomaly, just make sure you don't become the picnic yourself.
Find the artifact in the "Badlands" anomaly
Find the artifact in the "Badlands" anomaly.
Researchers: Bring Candidate Pirogov a PDA and two experimental samples

The stalker-assistant who was studying anomalies on Pirogov's behalf before me has gone missing. Valuable information about the studied anomalies has disappeared with him. I need to find the assistant and his PDA, retrieve the data on the anomalies, and then extract the objects from the anomalies for study.
Find the missing stalker's PDA

Most likely, the stalker got caught by bandits. But our primary concern is the important information on his PDA. It seems his signal was coming from somewhere near the Flea Market close to the checkpoint; I should start looking there.
Find the artifact in the "Witches' Ring" anomaly
Find the artifact in the "Witches' Ring" anomaly. It's toxic and large, it won't be an easy task.
Find the artifact in the "Soda" anomaly
Find the artifact in the "Soda" anomaly.
Find the artifact using coordinates from the missing stalker's PDA
The location of the desired sample is unknown. First, you must find the PDA of the stalker who was working for Pirogov before me.
Researchers: Bring Chernov three artifacts from the Army Warehouses territory
You need to find three different artifacts and bring them to Professor Chernov. This will be a real test, the Army Warehouses is quite a dangerous place.
Find the artifact in the "Acid Swamp" anomaly
Find the artifact in the "Acid Swamp" anomaly.
Find the artifact in the "Carousel" anomaly
Find the artifact in the "Carousel" anomaly.
Find the artifact in the "Steamer" anomaly
Find the artifact in the "Steamer" anomaly. A harsh anomaly radiating extreme heat from burning mines. You shouldn't linger there.
Researchers: Bring Chernov a stalker's PDA and two artifacts from the Red Forest

Professor Chernov tasked some stalker with creating maps of anomalous zones in the Red Forest. The work was finished, but the stalker had to flee the territory before he could transmit the data. I need to find his PDA, which he dropped somewhere in the tunnels to Limansk, near the bridge.
Find the missing stalker's PDA in the western tunnels
While running from Monolith fanatics, the stalker dropped his PDA with research data somewhere in the western tunnels. I need to find it to figure out which anomalous zones I have to explore.
Find the artifact in the "Symbiont" anomaly
After analyzing the map in the stalker's PDA, I managed to identify the "Symbiont" anomaly as one that requires investigation.
Find the artifact in the "Underground Thunderstorm" anomaly
After analyzing the map in the stalker's PDA, I managed to identify the "Underground Thunderstorm" anomaly as one that requires investigation. It is located underground, in the northwestern mines.
Find the artifact somewhere in the Red Forest

The Red Forest is dangerous and treacherous. Fortunately, the lost stalker's PDA has a map with the anomalies we need. To find the artifacts, you first need to find this PDA somewhere in the western tunnels.
Researchers: Find an artificial artifact

According to Chernov, artifacts can be created artificially. It's worth searching the house of a scientist who might have been doing this even before the catastrophe. Apparently, his house was located near the place where the Generators anomaly is now designated. Perhaps this is no coincidence.
Researchers: Visit the X-19 complex

Laboratory X-19, known as the "Bunker", apparently engaged in the creation of artificial artifacts. Now this laboratory is destroyed, but documents of interest to us could have survived. We need to find them. Perhaps they will tell us where we can find an "artifact farm".
Search the entrance to X-19
Perhaps this is where something pointing to the famous "artifact beds" was left behind. I need to check the entrance to the laboratory for documents.
Find the artifact in the Dead Forest

According to the documents, the artifacts were grown in the forest south of the complex. There are only very rough, blurry coordinates of the trees that should be examined for anomalous objects, so I'll probably have to comb the entire forest.
Researchers: Find two artifacts in the Dead City

For a complete matrix of the Zone, scientists need to cover all territories. Now our goal is the Dead City, which they still haven't explored. Professor Chernov gave me approximate coordinates for two anomalies he is interested in.
Find the artifact in the administrative building
Find the artifact in the City Committee building. The scanner should help.
Find the artifact in the Palace of Culture
Find the artifact in the Palace of Culture.
Researchers: Find three anomalous samples in the vicinity of Jupiter
Professor Zhuk is compiling a spectrogram of samples from different anomalous zones in Jupiter. He asked me to find these samples.
Find the artifact in the "Bitumen" anomaly
Find the artifact in the "Bitumen" anomaly. It's a hot place; without thermal protection it will be difficult.
Find the artifact in the "Concrete Bath" anomaly
Find the artifact in the "Concrete Bath" anomaly. It seems experienced stalkers avoided the anomaly itself by jumping along the remains of the concrete columns.
Find the artifact in the "Anomalous Grove"
Find the artifact in the "Anomalous Grove". You will need serious protection against toxins.
Researchers: Find the remaining samples for Professor Zhuk
The second set of samples is located in the remaining anomalous zones, and Professor Zhuk gave me exact coordinates to explore them.
Find the artifact in the "Train" anomaly

The unmarked "Train" anomaly is not far from the scientists' bunker. No one looks for artifacts there, but that doesn't mean the samples we're interested in aren't there. Most likely, there's a hatch somewhere in the train cars that will let you get inside.
Find the artifact in the northwestern tunnel
This tunnel is poorly explored, which means it's interesting. Rumor has it that there might be a controller's lair in there.
Find the artifact in the "Volkhov" complex
The old anti-aircraft missile complex was abandoned due to the abundance of underground anomalies. There are sure to be the samples we need there... along with mutants.
Researchers: Find four samples in Pripyat and its surroundings
Pripyat is practically inaccessible to scientists due to the presence of Monolith. However, samples from there are critical to completing their research. I need to track them down.
Find the artifact in the "Vine" anomaly
The Vine is a most amazing anomalous formation in the eastern part of Pripyat. The sample should be somewhere up high, so I'll have to climb.
Find the artifact in the school
A giant gravitational anomaly in the area of the old school. It covers several floors at once, so it's worth checking the interior rooms.
Find the artifact in the "Avangard" anomaly

The instrument readings are off the charts there. Even from a distance of several kilometers around the Avangard stadium, a multitude of anomalous formations are detected. A sample from that territory is absolutely mandatory for us.
Find the artifact in an unmarked electrical anomaly
Find the artifact in an anomaly located somewhere in the southern regions of Pripyat.
Researchers: Find a memory module and three samples for Docent Vorobushkin

Vorobushkin was able to repair and use old equipment from the Krug Antenna Complex. He left his memory module there, which contains the coordinates of the anomalous zones from which the samples must be extracted.
Find the memory module at the Krug Antenna Complex

Docent Vorobushkin placed scanning equipment at the "Krug" radar station. This is how he gathered all the necessary information about the anomalies in Zaton. Vorobushkin is currently in a safe place, but the memory module was left at the station. To get the coordinates of the anomalies needed for the study, you must retrieve this module.
Find the artifact in the "Swamp" anomaly
A strange territory with an abundance of gravitational and toxic formations. You need to be careful not to lose all your limbs.
Find the artifact in the "Pineoak" anomaly
Reminiscent of the "Vine", and toxic. Most likely, you'll manage to climb to the top here too?
Find the artifact somewhere in Zaton
In order to find out the exact location of the anomalies that need to be investigated, you must download the scan readings from Vorobushkin's memory module.
Researchers: Find three more artifacts in Zaton for Docent Vorobushkin
To finish compiling the spectrogram of different artifacts, Vorobushkin asked me to scan the remaining three anomalous zones in Zaton.
Find the artifact in the "Boiler" anomaly
Find the artifact in the "Boiler" anomaly. You'll need either good thermal protection or fast legs.
Find the artifact in the "Claw" anomaly
Find the artifact in the "Claw" anomaly. This gravitational anomaly intersects with a network of tunnels. Scan data suggests that the sample has moved somewhere down there.
Find the artifact on the Preobrazhensky Bridge
Not all anomalies are marked on the map. The Preobrazhensky Bridge, although intact, is impassable due to severe anomalies. You need to find a sample there.
Researchers: Bring the "Talking Stone" to Academician Skabinsky

The final phase. We trampled the whole Zone for this moment. The artifact that the research group led by Academician Skabinsky dreams of getting by any means. I need to hurry, he's waiting for me in Zaton.
Find the artifact in the "Anomalous Canyon" giga-anomaly

Perhaps this place can be called the center of the Zone. This is where all the noosphere disturbances begin. The scanner reports underground activity, so you should look for a way down, and stay careful.
Last Dawn: Return the scanner to Spore
Last Dawn: Retrieve the scanner from the anomaly in the southwestern part of the swamps
Last Dawn: Return to Cold
Last Dawn: Repel the Renegade attack
Last Dawn: Return to Cold
Last Dawn: Clear the southeastern farmstead of Renegades
Help Clear Sky hold the pump station.
Help the Clear Sky assault team capture the road to the Cordon.
The scanner is located in an arch-anomaly, south of the western tower and directly northwest of the Clear Sky base.
Last Dawn: Bring the PDA to Spore
Crutch died in a fight with bloodsuckers, but I managed to retrieve his PDA.
Last Dawn: In search of the scout
I need to find the Clear Sky scout named Crutch before some beast drags him off to its lair. Spore reported that the last signal came from the north of the Swamps, by the road.
Last Dawn: Meet with Cold
Cold reported that the scout's PDA has been decrypted and he's waiting to meet with me.
Last Dawn: Meet with the mercenary Scar
I managed to find out where Scar is located. Now my task is to learn what he knows about the missing Clear Sky members.
Last Dawn: Fight off the mutants
Last Dawn: Talk to Scar
A pack of pseudodogs caught our scent, so we'll have to fight them off.
Last Dawn: Find out about Scar
I need to ask Sidorovich about the mercenary named Scar.
Last Dawn: Talk to Strider
I need to bring the decryptor to Strider. His squad is located in the Jupiter surroundings, at the checkpoint south of Yanov station.
Last Dawn: Talk to Strider

Scar reported that the surviving Clear Sky members might be among the ranks of the Monolith Outcasts. Their squad is located in the Jupiter surroundings, at the checkpoint. I need to find the squad leader, Strider, and gather all the information about the missing people.
Last Dawn: Talk to Cold
I have completed my task. I need to report back to Cold and let him know his people are still alive.
Last Dawn: Repel the counterattack
Last Dawn: Talk to Strider
According to the Outcasts, the fanatics at the river port in the Nort East of Pripyat have a device for decoding encrypted conversations. I need to retrieve it.
Last Dawn: Seize the device
According to the Outcasts, the fanatics at the river port have a device for decoding encrypted conversations.
Last Dawn: Talk to Gamayun
Last Dawn: Rescue the rogue scout unit
A squad of Outcasts of the Monolith is trapped in eastern Pripyat, near the dormitory. Among them is one of the surviving members of Clear Sky, I have to rescue them or my mission was for nothing.
Anomalous activity scanner
Decoder
A device used by the Outcasts of the Monolith to listen in on the fanatics' conversations.
Hunter's BM-16 shotgun.
An old shotgun with a couple of markings on it.
Scar's PDA.
Among the many entries there is one very interesting one: "Strider has assembled a new group to fight the Monolith. Rumor has it that among his men are former members of Lebedev's strike team."
Heavy briefcase
A special case with loot for the Bartender.
Special device for studying anomalous fields, belonging to the group Clear Sky.
Crutch's PDA
Encrypted information related to the Clear Sky faction is stored in this PDA.
Flash drive of the madman.
The information is encrypted.
Documents from the roadblock
Military expedition report from the North of the Zone.
Compact scanner for measuring anomalous activity

The newest and convenient model for measurements, created especially for military stalkers and scientific groups, alas, for the traders is of no special value, because each scanner is individual and only starts to work when the code is entered.
Take the case to the merchant.
Steal a case from a roadblock
To climb the roadblock and from there to steal the case with the report of the military expedition from the North of the Zone.
So, what do I have to do to get information on Scar?

Well, here's the thing... A box with a report from one of the expeditions that went north was handed over to the roadblock from deep in the Zone. During the day they guard it as if it were filled with pure plutonium, but at night for some reason leave no more than two guards. Sneak up to the roadblock and get that box for me. And I'll spare no expense to you... within reason. You'll do it, won't you ?
I'll do it.
You know, I don't think so. I value my life.
Well, I've got the money ready, but don't... don't make any noise, okay? We'd all be in for a world of hurt if the military gets pissed off.
I found them, here.
Help the Clear Sky assault team capture the Machine Yard from the Military in the north of the Swamp.
Last Dawn: Destroy the Military and seize the Machine Yard.
Find the documents in the dungeon of the Agroprom Research Institute
Find secret documents that contain information about the studies conducted at the Institute and take them to Colonel Kuznetsov.
Find documents in the underground laboratory of X-18.
Colonel Kuznetsov ordered to get documents from a secret laboratory X-18. The military command wanted information about the experiments and experimentation that took place in this laboratory complex.
Find the documents in the laboratory X-16 and disable the psi-installation

The commander of the military unit in the Research Institute "Agroprom" instructed me to go to the laboratory X-16, which is located on the territory of the former lake "Yantar" and to get secret documentation and turn off the psi-installation at the same time. He also advised me to get a good psi-protection first. According to him, the scientists in the mobile bunker had just developed some means of protection against psi-radiation.
Find the documents in the X-10 lab and disable the Brain Burner.

I'm ready to break through to the North. I have protection against psi exposure, all that remains is to break through the Radar, infiltrate the laboratory, take the documents and disable the main psi installation in the Zone.
Find the documents in the X-8 lab.

I continue to collect all the mysteries of the lab experiments in the Zone for the military command. This time Kuznetsov sends me for a walk through Pripyat to find a certain laboratory X-8 which apparently was engaged in the creation of high-precision weapons whose mechanism was based on pulse energy and to extract from there all the important documents.
Find Documents in the Pripyat Dungeons
It is necessary to penetrate to the secret object Pripyat-1, referred to as Pripyat Dungeons by stalkers, to find the documents of the research which were carried out there.
Destroy the control room "Monolith" at Chernobyl and get all the documentation

I'm going on one last trip to get the final piece of documentation, at Chernobyl, to the "Monolith" control bunker, which will unlock probably the biggest mystery of the Zone: where the Executor of Wishes came from. Also, I was ordered to destroy this command post if possible. But before leaving, the colonel advised me to find a certain hermit in the swamps, the Swamp Doctor is called by the locals, he should know where the decoder to open the door to the command center is located.
Return to Colonel Kuznetsov.
Operation Monolith Revengeance: Get to the CNPP Generators
The time has come to storm the CNPP Generators. Meet the military squad at the Generators, they have taken up a position in the old village.
Capture the base
Vasil Nevezuchy.
Captain Shkryabenko
Operation Monolith Revengeance: storm the Chernobyl nuclear power plant
All units operating in the Zone are ordered to move towards the Chernobyl nuclear power plant. Operation Monolith commander "Quartet" has deployed field headquarters near the gate leading to Zaton.
Operation Monolith Revengeance: destroy the first checkpoint
Help Spetsnaz teams destroy the first roadblock.
Operation Monolith Revengeance: destroy the second roadblock
Help Spetsnaz teams destroy the second roadblock.
Operation Monolith Revengeance: destroy the third checkpoint
Help Spetsnaz teams destroy the third roadblock.
